nav_attribution.sum_cost_return.aggregation: sum over book round-trips of total traded cost on the netted delta / NAV
nav_attribution.sum_cost_return.asymmetry: total cost charged on the traded delta of the netted book, including impact
nav_attribution.sum_cost_return.base: realized attribution of the single netted-book NAV walk, as a fraction of NAV
nav_attribution.sum_cost_return.name: nav_attribution.sum_cost_return

nav_attribution.sum_funding_return.aggregation: sum over book round-trips of accrued funding cash / NAV
nav_attribution.sum_funding_return.asymmetry: netted cash funding accrual on the net held position
nav_attribution.sum_funding_return.base: realized attribution of the single netted-book NAV walk, as a fraction of NAV
nav_attribution.sum_funding_return.name: nav_attribution.sum_funding_return

nav_attribution.sum_gross_return.aggregation: sum over book round-trips of realized price proceeds / NAV
nav_attribution.sum_gross_return.asymmetry: realized round-trip price attribution of the netted book NAV path
nav_attribution.sum_gross_return.base: realized attribution of the single netted-book NAV walk, as a fraction of NAV
nav_attribution.sum_gross_return.name: nav_attribution.sum_gross_return

nav_attribution.sum_impact_return.aggregation: sum over book round-trips of market-impact cost / NAV
nav_attribution.sum_impact_return.asymmetry: component of sum_cost_return, not a second subtraction from net
nav_attribution.sum_impact_return.base: realized attribution of the single netted-book NAV walk, as a fraction of NAV
nav_attribution.sum_impact_return.name: nav_attribution.sum_impact_return

nav_attribution.sum_net_return.aggregation: gross plus funding minus cost, summed over book round-trips
nav_attribution.sum_net_return.asymmetry: reconciles with the NAV path's realized PnL
nav_attribution.sum_net_return.base: realized attribution of the single netted-book NAV walk, as a fraction of NAV
nav_attribution.sum_net_return.name: nav_attribution.sum_net_return
